title: Storm
description: Experimental Minecraft modpack with outstanding performance designed to replace and outperform Optifine
body:
# Development is currently paused indefinitely. All efforts are focused on [Thunder](https://modrinth.com/modpack/Thunder)


---

Storm is an open-beta Optifine drop-in replacement modpack designed for Fabric, Based on [Thunder](https://modrinth.com/modpack/Thunder).

## Features
* Exceptional performance surpassing Optifine
* Comprehensive support for nearly all Optifine features, including texture packs, dynamic lights, and more
* Regular updates ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions
* Fabric-based, enabling seamless integration with a wide range of mods supporting the Fabric ecosystem

## Difference from Optifine
* Superior performance and Better mod compatibility
* Some minor feature are missing: Fancy Grass, custom colors and extreme render distance ([Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) or [Distant Horizont](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) can be added) 

**Note:** This release is currently in beta. Kindly report any bugs encountered during your experience. Later updates will include support for older Minecraft versions and compatibility with Quilt.

[Storm icons](https://www.flaticon.com/free-icons/thunderstorm) created by apien - Flaticon.
